data.title: Delancey Street Launches Industry-First Pre-Default MCA Reconciliation Program for Small Businesses Struggling Under Merchant Cash Advance Payments
data.description: Delancey Street, a New York-based company, has launched the Reconciliation Shield™, which is the inaugural structured business debt relief initiative aimed at reducing merchant cash advance payments prior to default. This program incorporates reconciliation clauses integrated into the merchant's MCA agreement, thus offering a proactive approach to managing debt. This innovative solution is a groundbreaking step in the finance industry, providing a strategic tool for merchants to lower their financial burden and enhance their financial stability.

data.title: Astec Announces Quarterly Dividend
data.description: In Chattanooga, Tennessee, on April 27, 2026, Astec Industries, Inc. (NASDAQ: ASTE) revealed a quarterly dividend of $0.13 per share. This dividend is scheduled to be disbursed on or around May 29, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of the market's closure on May 13, 2026.

data.title: Keeper Security Introduces Verify Mode and New Browser Controls to Prevent Phishing and Credential Misuse
data.description: A new feature has been introduced by Keeper Security in Chicago on April 27, 2026, which aims to enhance security for enterprises. This feature validates credential usage at the point of entry to prevent phishing attacks before credentials are compromised. Keeper Security is known for its expertise in zero-trust and zero-knowledge identity security as well as Privileged Access Management. This innovative enhancement could potentially help in safeguarding enterprises from cyber threats, making it a significant step in improving security measures.

data.title: From the Company That Brought You "America Reads the Bible," Great American Media Launches "America Sings the Anthem" to Honor America's 250th Birthday
data.description: Submissions will be accepted until May 25 for the opportunity to be a part of a nationwide initiative starting on July 4. Great American Media, known for its successful America Reads the Bible program reaching millions of households, is seeking featured voices for this new project. The initiative will aim to engage a wide audience and promises a significant impact.

data.title: Verizon’s Transformation Actions Deliver Growth & Profitability in 1Q26; Company Raises Adjusted EPS Guidance
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, Verizon announced robust financial results, showcasing the positive impact of their transformation efforts, which have led to increased growth and profitability. As a result, the company has decided to raise its guidance for Adjusted Earnings Per Share (EPS) moving forward.

data.title: Monster Energy and Monster Army Riders Sweep Pro Men's Podium at Opening Stop of the 2026 Monster Army Recon Tour in San Diego
data.description: Bryce Tryon from Monster Energy emerged victorious in the Pro Men's BMX competition held at Clairemont Skatepark, with Brady Baker, also from Monster Energy, securing the 2nd position, and Kaden Stone from Monster Army finishing in 3rd place in the same division. In the Sport Class Men category, Aaden Reed from Monster Army clinched the top spot, while Ronan Fazio took the runner-up position. Additionally, other talented participants from Monster Army also showcased their skills during the event.

data.title: Solstice Advanced Materials Declares Dividend of $0.075 per Common Share
data.description: Solstice Advanced Materials, based in Morris Plains, New Jersey, declared a regular quarterly dividend of $0.075 per share for its common stock. This announcement was made today by the company's Board of Directors. The stock is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol SOLS.

data.title: SCHMID Group N.V. details Q1 2026 progress, focusing on bolstering financial health. #businessupdate #balance-sheet
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached a record high of 10.2%, with over 14 million people currently out of work. Additionally, the GDP has decreased by 4.7% in the last quarter, marking the largest decline since the recession of 2008. These alarming figures have sparked concerns about the state of the economy and the possible long-term effects on businesses and individuals. Experts are now calling for immediate government intervention to address the growing economic crisis and prevent further damage to the country's financial stability.

data.title: Fulcrum Therapeutics Appoints Josh Lehrer to its Board of Directors
data.description: Fulcrum Therapeutics, based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, disclosed on April 27, 2026, that Dr. Josh Lehrer, M.D., M.Phil., FACC, has joined its Board of Directors as an independent member. Fulcrum is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company traded on NASDAQ under the symbol FULC, specializing in creating small molecules to enhance the well-being of individuals with rare hematological ailments. This strategic addition to the board aims to bolster the company's leadership with Dr. Lehrer's expertise in the field.

data.title: AECOM awarded USACE Baltimore District contract to deliver environmental services
data.description: AECOM, a renowned global infrastructure leader listed on NYSE as ACM, has been chosen for a multi-award environmental services agreement by the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers in Baltimore District. This contract allows AECOM to provide advanced environmental cleanup solutions, emphasizing the reduction of harmful contaminants through site mitigation and remediation services. This opportunity will focus on addressing complex cleanup issues and supporting the mission of reducing hazardous substances.

data.title: Eton Pharmaceuticals Announces Initiation of Clinical Study for Product Candidate ET-700
data.description: The company will be conducting a study to evaluate its extended-release form of zinc acetate in comparison to GALZIN® (zinc acetate) and a placebo for the treatment of Wilson disease. This trial aims to determine the efficacy and safety of the new formulation. Patients with Wilson disease will be randomized to receive either the extended-release zinc acetate, GALZIN®, or a placebo over a specified period. The study will involve a significant number of participants and will provide valuable insights into the potential benefits of the new formulation for Wilson disease treatment.

data.title: Granite Completes Acquisition of Kenny Seng Construction to Expand Vertically-Integrated Home Market in Utah
data.description: Granite (NYSE: GVA) has finalized the acquisition of Kenny Seng Construction, based in Utah. This acquisition bolsters Granite's integrated construction and construction materials operations in the region. The key highlights of the acquisition include broadening Granite's presence in Utah's growing market, augmenting its construction and materials capabilities. This deal also adds various end-to-end services such as earthwork, site preparation, and concrete work to Granite's portfolio in Utah.
